details.address: 4808 Central Ave Suit H G, Charlotte, NC 28205

raw_data.address: 4808 Central Ave Suit H G, Charlotte, NC 28205
raw_data.name: Crazy burger & coffee

reviews_data.review_text: Food is amazing. However do not miss the coffee and tea from Yemin.  You will never go to Starbucks again

10/10 The restaurant is gorgeous on the inside! The double crazy burger and onion rings were the best I ever had. The burger was cooked perfectly. Most of all everyone was friendly and had awesome customer service 🙏🏽

The lamb rice at this restaurant is especially delicious. I also ordered fries, and they were very flavorful with great seasoning—much better than the fries at most burger places. Next time, I really want to try their burgers. Everything is so tasty.

I ordered the half chicken over rice. You definitely get your money's worth and all sorts of seasonings. I also went with Mom for breakfast and she tried the home Fries platter and she devoured it. I definitely recommend this restaurant. I promise you you'll definitely come back for more, just as I did. 😁
Very good food

review_questions.Recommended dishes: blt Sandwich, Eggs and Sausage Platter, Grilled Cheese, Crazy Double Burger, Onion Ring, Sausage Egg & Cheese

reviews_data.review_text: The best in the east side of Charlotte, every single thing I have tried here is great, clean, and great customer service
Very delicious
Customer service was EXCELLENT and the food was DELICIOUS 😋  we ordered takeout it's definitely worth it!!!!!!!
They have the best food
Found this place early morning.The staff were very friendly and the food was so good! Will be back!
Have the bas food
